caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap with headphones on. The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio or a small office, decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him. To the right, there is a clothing rack with various garments and a mannequin dressed in a white shirt. The man seems engaged in conversation, leaning slightly forward as he speaks into the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet focused environment for discussion or storytelling.
